notes: Rewrote the hosted homepage to frame Pathmark as a routine, goal, calendar, and tasklist management system across Online and Desktop.
Added clearer public guidance about where Pathmark data is stored: local Workspace, user-owned Google Sheet, and Supabase access records.
Added privacy and permissions guidance explaining Google login, the narrow drive.file scope, Supabase role storage, GitHub release files, and the desktop Workspace boundary.
Pathmark Online remains backed by the user-owned Pathmark Sync sheet; Supabase remains limited to roles, status, feature flags, and audit logs.
